## Summary

Describe the change and the protocol/skill area it affects.

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter is valid YAML, if touched.
- [ ] `skills/registry.yaml` is updated, if a skill/version was added.
- [ ] Bundled reference license files are preserved.
- [ ] No secrets, local databases, logs, or private project state are included.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where useful.
